Alex Kim
alex.kim@example.com | https://linkedin.com/in/alex-kim | https://github.com/alexkim

SUMMARY
Backend engineer focused on Python services and data-heavy systems. Built REST APIs, automated deployments,
and improved reliability/latency in production.

EXPERIENCE
Acme Analytics — Backend Engineer (Jan 2022 – Present)
- Built and maintained Python/Django APIs used by 50k+ monthly active users.
- Designed PostgreSQL schemas and optimized slow queries (reduced p95 latency by ~30%).
- Implemented background processing with Celery/Redis for long-running tasks.
- Containerized services with Docker and shipped to AWS (ECS), improving deploy consistency.

Northwind Tools — Software Engineer (Jun 2019 – Dec 2021)
- Developed internal microservices in Python (FastAPI) and integrated with third-party APIs.
- Added CI checks (tests + lint) and improved incident response runbooks.

EDUCATION
BS Computer Science — Example State University (2015 – 2019)

SKILLS
Python, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, REST APIs, Docker, AWS, Git
